Metadata.title: b-mate
Metadata.description: Track your project's progress with total transparency.

hero.eyebrow: What clients can't see, they always imagine worse.
hero.subhead: b-mate shows your clients what's actually happening on their project — no jargon, no status meetings, no re-explaining it all yourself.

clients.card1Description: Tasks, roadmap, what's left to do: the real version, not a tidied-up summary.
clients.card2Description: Why this choice, why that tech — translated into plain language, never jargon.
clients.card3Description: No more digging through a file, a message, or a stray ticket to understand where the project stands — and what you're reading is always real, never generated.

developers.card1Description: Clients check progress themselves. You get back the time you used to spend telling them.
developers.card2Description: b-mate doesn't add any process, doesn't impose any method.
developers.card3Title: A client who sees, a client who stays
developers.card3Description: Fewer doubts, fewer questions about price, more projects that stick around.

features.card1Description: Create your tasks, track their status — your client watches progress update live.
features.card2Description: Add a client by email — they join their project space in seconds.
features.card3Description: Clients look, they don't touch — zero risk to how your team actually works.
features.card4Description: Run several projects at once, each with its own members and its own access.

faq.q1: Does b-mate replace my current tools?
faq.a1: No. b-mate doesn't replace your task tracker or your tech stack — it simply makes what's happening in them visible to your client.
faq.q2: Does my client need to create an account?
faq.a2: Yes, via an email invitation link. Signing up takes under a minute, no technical skill required.
faq.a3: Every session is authenticated and tied to one user — your client only ever sees the projects they've been invited to.
faq.a4: b-mate is in launch phase — pricing will be announced soon.
faq.q5: Can I try it before committing?
faq.a5: Yes — you can create an account and a first project right now to see how b-mate fits into the way you work.

closing.title: Show what's really happening. Earn their trust.
